pool.baseline:
hey, i'm looking at some numbers from our recent audit here in the rotterdam hub and things aren't squaring up. we've got some discrepancies in the sensor component stock. can you look at this and help me figure out what might be causing the variance?

| SKU | Digital Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| SN-990-X | 1,240 | 1,232 | -8 |
| SN-442-B | 850 | 847 | -3 |
| SN-112-Q | 3,100 | 3,091 | -9 |
| SN-773-K | 420 | 419 | -1 |

its small amounts but it's happening every week.

pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm seeing a weird 500 error on our /api/v1/checkout/complete endpoint. It only happens intermittently, usually when there's high traffic. Here is a snippet from the logs during one of the crashes:

[2023-10-27 14:22:01] ERROR: ConnectionTimeout during inventory_update_service call. 
[2023-10-27 14:22:01] ERROR: Failed to acquire lock on resource: db_transaction_lock_442.
[2023-10-27 14:22:02] CRITICAL: Deadlock detected in transaction pool.
[2023-10-27 14:22:02] FATAL: Internal Server Error - unexpected state in state_machine_v2.

Can you look at this and tell me what's likely causing the instability?
